name: AI Compare Hard Router
description: Intercepts search-style user requests before model dispatch and routes them directly to the AI Compare GUI runner.

runnerPath.label: Runner Path
runnerPath.help: Legacy override path. The plugin uses its bundled runner in bin/ by default.

extensionId.label: Extension ID
extensionId.help: Optional AI Compare extension id override. Use a release-specific value or AI_COMPARE_EXTENSION_ID.

browserApp.label: Browser App
browserApp.help: Optional browser app name such as Google Chrome or chrome.

timeoutMs.label: Runner Timeout
timeoutMs.help: How long to wait for ai-compare-openclaw-fast.js before returning a timeout error.

installUrl.label: Install URL
installUrl.help: Optional browser extension install page URL shown in missing-extension guidance. Use a release-specific value or AI_COMPARE_INSTALL_URL.

debugLogPath.label: Debug Log Path
debugLogPath.help: Optional absolute path for hard-router debug logs. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/logs/ai-compare-hard-router.log.
